system_prompt:
你是时尚资讯主笔，负责输出一条 digest 的长文。

输入包括 digest 计划与对应的 article 摘要/引用。你的任务是生成完整中文稿件：
- title_zh、dek_zh 为中文标题与导语
- body_markdown 为简洁可读的 Markdown 正文（不要包含 JSON）
- source_article_ids 必须来自输入

规则：
- 只基于输入事实，不要编造
- 输出必须是严格 JSON，符合 schema
- 不要输出解释文本或 Markdown 代码块

输出 JSON 结构：
{
  "title_zh": "...",
  "dek_zh": "...",
  "body_markdown": "...",
  "source_article_ids": ["..."]
}

messages.content:
{"plan": {"business_date": "2026-03-29", "facet": "brand_market", "story_keys": ["9ce2f07e-3778-45f4-a5be-3b7fea656dad", "9e680581-5901-4e52-961c-af062414b72b"], "article_ids": ["5c3f818f-9096-4b24-957d-cc72ee1613aa", "5f75220f-dd34-40fd-af73-702ca274bb4d"], "editorial_angle": "名人符号持续引爆消费市场的情感共鸣，Carolyn Bessette Kennedy的怀旧美学带动其 signature 香水售罄，ROSÉ的代言效应则为PUMA H-STREET新品创造话题热度，显示经典风格偶像与当代巨星同样具备强大的消费驱动力", "title_zh": "明星符号学：从CBK怀旧香氛到ROSÉ效应", "dek_zh": "当90年代风格偶像遇上K-pop顶级流量，名人IP如何成为品牌市场热度的催化剂", "source_names": ["Elle", "Marie Claire Taiwan"]}, "source_articles": [{"article_id": "5c3f818f-9096-4b24-957d-cc72ee1613aa", "source_name": "Elle", "title_raw": "Carolyn Bessette Kennedy Swore by This Affordable Perfume—And Now I Do Too", "summary_raw": "Who wouldn’t want to smell like CBK? Shop her signature scent here.", "body_markdown": "# Carolyn Bessette Kennedy Swore by This Affordable Perfume—And Now I Do Too

Who wouldn’t want to smell like CBK? Shop her signature scent here.

Last night, I spent an hour straight glued to my couch watching the finale of Love Story—FX and Hulu’s series following the romance between John F. Kennedy Jr. and Carolyn Bessette. As a mere 23-year-old, I had only ever heard stories of the eligible bachelor’s days in New York City and the mall-clerk-turned-fashion-It-girl’s effortless beauty. However, I never fully understood the allure of the power couple until lead actors Paul Anthony Kelly and Sarah Pidgeon recreated their iconic story in front of my eyes. Filled with equal amounts of awe and jealousy of Bessette Kennedy’s polished, minimalist style, I immediately began researching everylipstick, headband, pencil skirt, and scent that defined her swift way of life.

While I wasn’t able to wear JFK Jr.’s white button-down into the office today, I was able to snag the affordable fragrance Bessette Kennedy swore by. According to The New York Times bestseller Once Upon a Time: The Captivating Life of Carolyn Bessette-Kennedy by Elizabeth Beller, her signature perfume was Abdul Kareem’s Egyptian Musk Oil. The unisex fragrance smells powdery-fresh with creamy notes of musk, myrrh, and rose. The thick oil melts beautifully into the skin, and the scent truly comes alive (and seriously lasts) when warmed by body heat. With a clean, balanced finish reminiscent of fluffy white towels fresh out of the dryer, it’s no wonder the minimalist queen of the ’90s couldn’t get enough of it. Just one whiff is enough to channel quiet-luxury dressing with simple silhouettes and muted tones, and embrace unstyled beach waves in your naturally polished hair. Or, as Bessette Kennedy’s coworker says in the first episode of Love Story, enough to get “inhaled” by men at a bar. “By the way, I wore your Egyptian Musk last night,” she tells her work bestie in a crowded office elevator. “I’m not kidding, three different guys, like, inhaled me. One of them said I smelled like a laundromat.”

The good news is that Egyptian Musk Oil is conveniently available on Amazon. The bad news? The price of Abdul Kareem’s formula skyrocketed from $17 to $90 overnight, before selling out entirely after the release of episode four. One eBay seller even listed an unused 0.5-ounce bottle for $5,000 amid the world’s renewed obsession—and it’s still available if you’re willing to splurge! If not, I’ve found three near-identical Egyptian Musk Oil blends that I believe would receive the CBK stamp of approval. Needless to say, it’s important to act fast on this fragrant purchase.

But whether the frenzy fades or the exact scent restocks, one thing remains clear: Bessette Kennedy’s beauty ethos still resonates decades later. In an era of oversaturation and viral microtrends, her pared-back and personal approach to style feels almost radical. Maybe the real secret wasn’t just Egyptian Musk Oil, but the quiet confidence she wore with it. Still, if a single swipe on my wrist gets me one step closer to her level of understated elegance, consider it my new go-to.
"}, {"article_id": "5f75220f-dd34-40fd-af73-702ca274bb4d", "source_name": "Marie Claire Taiwan", "title_raw": "PUMA H-STREET 強勢登場！攜手 ROSÉ 引爆中山潮流打卡熱點", "summary_raw": "PUMA 以 H-STREET 話題鞋款打造中山快閃空間，結合 ROSÉ 話題魅力與互動體驗，掀起春季最強潮流打卡風潮！", "body_markdown": "# PUMA H-STREET 強勢登場！攜手 ROSÉ 引爆中山潮流打卡熱點

PUMA 以 H-STREET 話題鞋款打造中山快閃空間，結合 ROSÉ 話題魅力與互動體驗，掀起春季最強潮流打卡風潮！

運動品牌 PUMA 推出全新 H-STREET 鞋款，以輕盈腳感與俐落外型為核心，延伸「Grab & Go」概念，重新詮釋隨手可得的率性穿搭風格，打造兼具機能與時髦感的日常鞋履選擇。為迎接新品上市，PUMA 將於 4 月 3 日至 4 月 26 日進駐台北中山商圈，打造期間限定「H-STREET 潮流得來速」快閃空間。現場結合潮流展示與沉浸式體驗，並邀請 ROSÉ 搶先演繹鞋款魅力，進一步放大話題聲量。空間中更設有大型形象打卡牆與限定互動裝置，讓消費者在參與過程中感受品牌風格。

作為 BLACKPINK 成員之一的 ROSÉ，其私下穿搭所帶動的薄底鞋風潮，已成為 2026 年關注焦點之一。本次活動以「Grab & Go」為靈感，將快速、直覺的穿搭概念轉化為實體體驗，從點餐窗口到外帶區域，串聯完整動線，打造兼具趣味與時尚感的打卡場景。

此外，現場亦推出多項互動與限定禮遇。消費者只需拍攝快閃空間畫面並分享至社群平台，即可參與客製化拍貼體驗，並兌換專屬紀念印刷。完成體驗後，還有機會獲得台灣限定 ROSÉ 主題燈箱招牌與客製帆布袋，將當下的潮流記憶轉化為可收藏的日常物件。

透過本次快閃企劃，PUMA 不僅強化 H-STREET 的市場話題，也成功將產品設計、名人效應與實體體驗融合，打造一場結合速度感與風格感的城市潮流事件。

活動內容詳情

活動日期：4月3日（五）— 4月26日（日）

活動時間：12:00 — 20:00

活動地點：心中山廣場（中山捷運站4號出口旁）

打卡小禮

於《PUMA H-STREET 潮流得來速》拍照打卡，分享至 IG 或 Threads 並 #PUMATAIWAN，即可獲得拍印機乙次。

買鞋大禮包

於《PUMA H-STREET 潮流得來速》領取商品取貨卡，並至新光三越南西一館 PUMA 專櫃購買 H-STREET 系列，即贈限量 ROSÉ 迷你燈箱招牌及客製化帆布袋。
